home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Your music, glowing in one place.
home.emptyBody: Import your own songs to start building your library. Everything stays on this device.

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.subtitle: Organize your library your way.
playlists.emptySongs: Drag songs here from your Library.
playlists.deleteConfirm: Delete this playlist? This can't be undone.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Songs you've marked as favorites.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet — tap the heart on any song to add it here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Make Lumen yours.
settings.themeHint: Switch between dark, light, or match your system
settings.sleepTimerHint: Automatically pause playback after a set time
settings.dataHint: Everything is stored on this device using IndexedDB
settings.exportHint: Save your songs, playlists, and settings as a backup file
settings.importHint: Restore from a previously exported backup file
settings.resetHint: Permanently remove every song, playlist, and setting
settings.resetConfirm: This will permanently delete your entire library from this device. This can't be undone. Continue?

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The story behind the glow.
about.description1: Lumen is an offline-first, open-source music player template — a soft yellow glow against a dark canvas, tuned for iPhone and desktop alike.
about.description2: It ships with zero bundled music. Import your own songs and Lumen reads their title, artist, album, and cover art automatically. Everything — your library, playlists, favorites, and settings — lives only on this device.
about.architectureBody: Vanilla HTML, CSS and JavaScript. No frameworks, no build step, no backend. IndexedDB for storage, the Web Audio API for the visualizer, and a Service Worker for offline use.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.noLyrics: No lyrics added for this song yet.
lyrics.placeholder: Paste lyrics here. Optional: start a line with [1:23] to sync it to that timestamp.

lmp.sectionHint: A portable package of songs, covers, lyrics, and playlists you can share or move between devices
lmp.author: Author (optional)
lmp.exportHint: This bundles your songs, covers, lyrics, and playlists into a single .lmp file you can share or back up.
lmp.exportSuccessMessage: {{songs}} songs and {{playlists}} playlists were packaged successfully.
lmp.importSuccessMessage: {{songs}} songs and {{playlists}} playlists were added to your library.
